theme.title: Mixed / Stock-Picker's Market
theme.summary: Communication Svcs (+1.72%) and Consumer Discretionary (+1.07%) led the market today, while Technology (-2.15%) and Energy (-1.40%) brought up the rear. Performance didn't cluster cleanly by style — growth averaged +0.21%, defensives -0.03%, and value/cyclicals -0.50% — more a stock-by-stock market than a single broad theme. Major indices moved in a tighter band — S&P 500 -0.03%, Dow -0.01%, Nasdaq +0.00% — without one clearly dominating. Small caps moved roughly in line with the broader market, with the Russell 2000 at -0.10%. The VIX rose 0.12% to 16.52, pointing to a bit more caution creeping in beneath the surface. Gold slipped 0.05% to $4,035.70, crude oil was little changed at $79.40, and bitcoin gained 0.00% — cross-asset moves weren't all pointing the same direction as equities.
